name: android-libcutils
title: android-libcutils
description:
Android utils library for C
This library provides common functionalities for android related tools.
.
This library is only used by Android SDK currently.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-libcutils because Android utils library for C.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-libcutils as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-libcutils with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-libcutils --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
